reading.title: Reading: An ideal world
reading.passage: If I had a lot of money, I would travel around the world. If everyone were kind, the world would be a better place. If I were a leader, I would invest more in education. If only we had more time to discuss this.

questions.question: The writer is currently travelling around the world.
questions.explanation: Đây là câu giả định (Conditional 2), chưa xảy ra thật.

questions.question: What would the writer invest more in as a leader?
questions.explanation: "If I were a leader, I would invest more in education."

reading.title: Reading: Real or hypothetical?
reading.passage: If it rains tomorrow, the match will be cancelled. If I were the coach, I would change the schedule. If I won the lottery, I would buy a big house. If you save money, you will buy a small house someday.

questions.question: Winning the lottery is a real, likely event for the writer.
questions.explanation: Đây là câu điều kiện loại 2 (giả định, khó xảy ra).

questions.question: What is a realistic plan mentioned in the passage?
options: Saving money to buy a house
questions.correct: Saving money to buy a house
questions.explanation: "If you save money, you will buy a small house someday." là câu điều kiện loại 1 (thực tế).
